# A note of thanks

* EDITORIAL
* Published: 10 December 2022

* Volume 37 , pages 1201–1203, ( 2022 )
* Cite this article

Download PDF

Save article

View saved research

European Journal of Epidemiology Aims and scope [Submit manuscript](https://www.editorialmanager.com/ejep/)

A note of thanks

Download PDF

* Albert Hofman <sup>1</sup>

* 1712 Accesses
* 3 Citations
* Explore all metrics

At the end of the 37th annual volume of the European Journal of Epidemiology, I wish to express my sincere gratitude, also on behalf of the other editors, the members of the editorial board and the publisher of the European Journal of Epidemiology, to the referees of the articles considered for the 2022 volume of EJE. Hundreds of busy colleagues have spent their time in assessing nearly 1800 manuscripts submitted to our Journal, in selecting the ones that may possibly be published, and in improving the quality of the selected articles. All manuscripts considered for publication in EJE are peer-reviewed, also research letters, letters to the editor, and other forms of correspondence. Many of the reviewers have helped us in the past years as well, and we are tremendously appreciative and grateful to them  [1 , 2 , 3 , 4 ]. It is largely thanks to them that EJE is doing well in attracting and publishing valuable contributions on epidemiologic research findings and epidemiologic methods.
